input: user-item interaction graph (one party) and user-user social graph (another party), with overlapping users but no direct access to each other's data
backbone: two-party graph convolution network (GCN) with privacy-preserving Sandwich-Encryption
key_idea: privacy-preserving two-party GCN that uses a Sandwich-Encryption module to enable collaborative graph convolution without exposing sensitive social data
datasets: four real-world datasets (not named in abstract)
metrics: recommendation accuracy (specific metrics not named in abstract)
